hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git push|vsce publish|ovsx publish|npm publish|deploy"; then echo "HARNESS: publish/push action requires human approval" >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "^rm |^rmdir |git clean"; then echo "HARNESS: file deletion requires human approval" >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "^curl |^wget |^fetch "; then echo "HARNESS: external network call requires human approval" >&2; exit 2; fi'
echo 'HARNESS: WebFetch requires human approval' >&2; exit 2
